title: Bethesda #0964
definition:
Bethesda = "house of mercy" or "flowing water"

 1) the name of a pool near the sheep-gate at Jerusalem, whose waters
    had curative powers
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bethesda = "house of mercy" or "flowing water"

 1) the name of a pool near the sheep-gate at Jerusalem, whose waters
    had curative powers

    NASB:  Bethesda, a pool in Jer.:
